name: nosepass
flavor_text: NOSEPASS’s magnetic nose is always pointed to the north. If two of these POKéMON meet, they cannot turn their faces to each other when they are close because their magnetic noses repel one another.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: harden
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: block
moves.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

moves.name: rock-throw
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: spark
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: discharge
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: zap-cannon
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: lock-on
moves.effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: bulldoze
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: captivate
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages if it’s the opposite gender.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: curse
moves.effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn.  Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.

moves.name: dazzling-gleam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: double-edge
moves.effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: earth-power
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: earthquake
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dig users.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: explosion
moves.effect: User faints.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: fire-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: flash-cannon
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: gravity
moves.effect: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.

moves.name: heavy-slam
moves.effect: Power is higher when the user weighs more than the target, up to a maximum of 120.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: high-horsepower
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: ice-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: iron-defense
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.

moves.name: meteor-beam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: natural-gift
moves.effect: Power and type depend on the held berry.

moves.name: pain-split
moves.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.

moves.name: power-gem
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: rock-blast
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: rock-polish
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: rock-slide
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: rock-smash
moves.effect: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: rock-tomb
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: sand-tomb
moves.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.

moves.name: sandstorm
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.

moves.name: secret-power
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.

moves.name: shock-wave
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: smack-down
moves.effect: Removes any immunity to Ground damage.

moves.name: stealth-rock
moves.effect: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.

moves.name: steel-beam
moves.effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.

moves.name: stomping-tantrum
moves.effect: Has double power if the user’s last move failed.

moves.name: stone-edge
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: strength
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: torment
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: volt-switch
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: head-smash
moves.effect: User receives 1/2 the damage inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: magnitude
moves.effect: Power varies randomly from 10 to 150.

moves.name: rollout
moves.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.

moves.name: wide-guard
moves.effect: Prevents any multi-target moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.

moves.name: ancient-power
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.

moves.name: defense-curl
moves.effect: Raises user’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: dynamic-punch
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: magic-coat
moves.effect: Reflects back the first effect move used on the user this turn.

moves.name: magnet-rise
moves.effect: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.

moves.name: mimic
moves.effect: Copies the target’s last used move.

moves.name: mud-slap
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: self-destruct
moves.effect: User faints.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

abilitiesDetailed.name: sturdy
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.

abilitiesDetailed.name: magnet-pull
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Prevents steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.

abilitiesDetailed.name: sand-force
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Strengthens rock, ground, and steel moves to 1.3× their power during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
